channel.title: How to optimize and boost css styling process?
channel.description: I used to write my css fast - like i have VS code tips and scss features. In frontity i have to write css in JS file like a string so the editor can not give me tips and writing css become like writing in notepad which is extremely not productively. I had idea that i can just write separated css files and connect them by GLOBAL tag but as i know this is not good for performance. So how can i optimise the process of styling?

item.title: How to optimize and boost css styling process?
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
@borysenko.alexander thanks I will check it out

Read full topic
item.source: How to optimize and boost css styling process?

item.source: How to optimize and boost css styling process?

item.title: How to optimize and boost css styling process?
item.dc:creator: borysenko.alexander
item.description:
I used to write my css fast - like i have VS code tips and scss features. In frontity i have to write css in JS file like a string so the editor can not give me tips and writing css become like writing in notepad which is extremely not productively. I had idea that i can just write separated css files and connect them by GLOBAL tag but as i know this is not good for performance. So how can i optimise the process of styling?

Read full topic
item.source: How to optimize and boost css styling process?
